CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Past_Experience__c ) = 'Do not intend to use deal process',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Past_Experience__c ) = 'Have never used deal process',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Past_Experience__c ) = 'Have used deal process on occasion',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Past_Experience__c ) = 'Experienced, frequent users of deal process',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Past_Experience
